race.comment: PULA (8) is flying and looks well placed to win again. She backed up the easy Pakenham heavy win with a tough victory over a late charging Autumn Slide, rewarded for early tactical speed. Finds another suitable race here, she'll roll forward and give a sight once more. LIKE A TIGER (3) is coming off a narrow win at Warrnambool on the heavy ground during the carnival. Always have to be wary backing those out of that week but the prior run reads well too and he has claims. GLENFINNAN (7) looks suited rising in trip having been unsuited staying at 1400m last time at Pakenham when working home fairly. He's bred to stay and could improve quickly going to this trip for the first time. BLUE COWBOY (10) should be at peak fitness now third up and can give a sight on speed from DRUTHERS (11) who won well last time but is off five weeks and back slightly in trip.
